text: Every morning I wake up at six o'clock and start with a glass of water and a light stretch. After a quick shower, I have breakfast while checking my emails. My work schedule starts at eight, and I focus on tasks until lunchtime. To stay active, I take a short walk or do yoga during my break. In the evenings, I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. I try to go to bed by ten. This routine helps me stay productive and healthy, and I rarely change it because consistency keeps me balanced and happy.
